title: random&cool
description: just random.. a mcreator mod that adds a ton of stuff mainly foucused on skittles but their are some other cool stuff and i am planing on adding more
body:
plans for december: 3 new mobs, 5 biomes, 1 dimension, 3 tools (that are not for mining)

a big but still small mod that lets you have fun with your friends, made in mcreator, its easy to use so i recomend if you wanna make a mod but dont know how to code
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

this mod adds burgers, a skittle dimension with random bone things end city's and the boss arena, there is a burger king but it has no floor, a anime biome that is completly red, a gyro sword and pickaxe, a skittle boss, a werid looking block my brother made in ms paint, a disco block that when you jump on it you jump high also when you walk on it you walk fast, grease related items, a milk liquid, skittle minons that spawn in the skittle dimension,
the gryo ore only spawns in the skittle dimension but the sword always spawns in a structure that spawns in the over world that acts as how to get skittles but not hardend skittles, a checker kind of banner pattern, and to light the skittle dimension portal you need a hardenend skittle

</details>


jei is now required

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**(*WARNING:this modpack is made as a joke it isnt balenced: the disco block launches you very far so you will most likely loose your location*)**

</details>


i plan on updating at the start of each month, if i dont update dont stress im either not avalible or im working extra

hey so this is kinda late like its october 23 so im gonna skip november but i will be working on a christmas/winter update
